title: AN ACT TO CHANGE THE NAME OF BARRIO BANTO-ANIN, MUNICIPALITY OF GASAN, PROVINCE OF MARINDUQUE, TO BARRIO BUKAL.

chunks.text:
H. No. 5631 / 53 OG No. 16, 5153 (August 31, 1957)

[ REPUBLIC ACT NO. 1739, June 21, 1957 ]

AN ACT TO CHANGE THE NAME OF BARRIO BANTO-ANIN, MUNICIPALITY OF GASAN, PROVINCE OF MARINDUQUE, TO BARRIO BUKAL.

Be it enacted by the Senate and House of Representatives of the Philippines in Congress assembled:

SECTION 1. The name of barrio Banto-anin, in the Municipality of Gasan, Province of Marinduque, is hereby changed to Bukal.

SEC. 2. This Act shall take effect upon its approval.

Approved, June 21, 1957.
